name: Dogecoin Core
description: A Dogecoin full node. Validates the Dogecoin blockchain and exposes the RPC API.

inputs.label: RPC user
inputs.help: Username for the dogecoind RPC API.

inputs.label: RPC password
inputs.help: Password for the RPC API. Stored encrypted.

compose:
name: "slashnode-dogecoind"
services:
  dogecoind:
    image: "ghcr.io/slashbinslashnoname/dogecoind:1.14.9"
    container_name: "dogecoind"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - "-printtoconsole"
      - "-server=1"
      - "-txindex=1"
      - "-rpcbind=0.0.0.0"
      - "-rpcallowip=0.0.0.0/0"
      - "-rpcport=22555"
      - "-port=22556"
      - "-rpcuser=${input.RPC_USER}"
      - "-rpcpassword=${secret.RPC_PASSWORD}"
    ports:
      - "22556:22556"
      - "127.0.0.1:22555:22555"
    volumes:
      - "dogecoin-data:/home/dogecoin/.dogecoin"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  dogecoin-data:
    name: "slashnode-dogecoind_dogecoind_dogecoin-data"
notes: Mainnet Dogecoin node with txindex. RPC is published on 127.0.0.1:22555 (reach it via the .onion or an SSH tunnel); P2P is public on 22556.
